learning_outcomes.description: Personal health and hygiene

performance_criteria.description: Wear clean, smart and appropriate personal Protective Equipment.
Work safely at all times, complying with health and safety and other relevant regulations and Guidelines.
Get any cuts, grazes and wounds Treated by the appropriate person.
Report illness and infection promptly to the appropriate Persons.
Summarize own responsibility under the health and safety Act as it relates to own occupation.
Guide others on general rules of Hygiene that must be followed.
Supervise the use of Personal Protection Equipment such as Head Protection, Foot Protection, Face and eye Protection, Hand and Body protection and Regulatory Protection.
State the importance of maintaining good personal Hygiene.
Describe how to deal with cuts, grazes and wounds and why it is important to do so
Report any accidents or near accidents quickly and accurately to the proper person.
Promote health, hygiene and safely procedures during work
Practice emergency procedures during work
Ensure organizational security procedures are followed
Ensure the disposal of waste and Pollution control with organic and Inorganic waste disposal methods.
Promote sound and noise control and protection methods
Supervise identification of any hazards or potential hazards and deal with these correctly.
State where information about health and safety in your workplace can be obtained
Describe the types of hazards in the workplace that may occur and how to deal with them
Differentiate between hazards that can be dealt with personally and those that should be reported to Appropriate personnel.

learning_outcomes.description: Hygiene, safe and secure workplace

performance_criteria.description: Carry out organizational procedures on how to warn other people about hazards and why this is important
State why accidents and near accidents should be reported and who they should be reported to

performance_criteria.description: Ensure that communication equipment are in good working Condition

performance_criteria.description: Recognize the sequence of various team activities
